mapper.sql: SELECT product_id as productId, name, category, brand, price, stock_quantity as stockQuantity FROM products
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.category, p.brand, p.price, p.stock_quantity, g.gift_id, g.name AS gift_name FROM products p LEFT OUTER JOIN gift_products g ON p.product_id = g.product_id

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.category, p.brand, p.price, p.stock_quantity, g.gift_id, g.name AS gift_name FROM products p LEFT OUTER JOIN gift_products g ON p.product_id = g.product_id AND g.gift_id IS NOT NULL WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, category, brand, price, stock_quantity) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity})
